title: Winds of Fate: RPG
description: Winds of Fate is an RPG-modpack that immerses players in a vast, fulfilling world. You will create your own legend.
body:
# _Where fate rules the storm_

![Traveller](https://i.postimg.cc/TYgBQdhn/2025-11-06-19-09-28.png)

## Review

Winds of Fate is an RPG-modpack that immerses players in a vast, fulfilling world. A bunch of unexplored worlds and structures, new weapons, armor and mechanics.
You will create your own legend — alone or side by side with your friends.

The build is well optimized. I added immersivity (GUI, mobs, music, sounds). Playing in multiplayer is now much more interesting — thanks to the «What Are They Up To» mod, teammates will be able to see what you are typing and what you are doing in the GUI. Also, thanks to the «Hardcore Revival» mod, after dealing fatal damage, players now have a chance to raise the fallen.

## Key Mods

- **Divine RPG** — is one of the largest modifications for Minecraft — one of the largest modifications for Minecraft. 8 New Dimensions 115+ New Mobs/Bosses Hundreds of New Blocks and Items Unique Weapons and Armor
- **ATi Structures**, **Dungeon and Taverns**, **Towns and Towers** — adds fantasy and medieval structures to your Minecraft world.
- **Myths & Legends** — a dark fantasy mod that introduces mythical creatures, structures, and relics, all inspired by global folklore.
- **Tyz's Skills** — adds independent progression, increasing your xp to level up and earning skill points that can be used to purchase and upgrade a variety of skills.
